name: Jesse | Hunter Getting Hunted
description:
A professional hitman, thought taking out you would be easy. But, the tables turned after you manage to beat the hell out of her...

Looks like the hunter has become the hunted~

Finally, I can upload the bot again after a few weeks, tbh I've been busy doing stuff irl, mb if I keep yall waiting :>

Yayy!!! a damn tomboy bot, a perfect combo, short hair + tan skin (breh) + huge titties, uwogghh. It's really hard to generate a good pic, also in the description I made it more detailed lmfao. So about the bot, she's a hitman or something who was ordered to kill the protagonist (you/{{user}}), and—before that happens you manage to beat the shit out of her, she's cornered. Well, here's your choice—do you want to do whatever you want to her or just let her be and leave? And yeah that's your choice, you're free to do whatever you want. (

(edit)

And I also just noticed that there are new rules or something?

Amimir (I haven't test the bot yet, I finna sleep)

Additional tags: to be added :>
